title: How to Actually Build Mobile Apps with AI in 2026 | A Complete Beginner's Tutorial
summary: JavaScript Mastery tutorial shows how to build a Duolingo clone in React Native using "Practical Vibe Coding," a workflow that leverages AI agents to accelerate development. The tutorial covers integration of vision agents, Clerk authentication, PostHog analytics, and real-time streaming capabilities to enable building feature-rich mobile apps with minimal manual coding.
